scripts.preinstall: node -e "const a=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||'';if(!a.includes('pnpm')){console.error('Use pnpm instead of npm/yarn for this repo.');process.exit(1);}"
scripts.dev:api: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run start
scripts.dev:local: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "wait-on -t 120000 http://127.0.0.1:8787/api/healthz && pnpm --filter @workspace/liver-tracker dev"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
